titleStmt.title: SII 9.586: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 586. (A.R. No. 2 of 1904.) ON THE RIGHT SIDE OF THE EASTERN GOPURA OF THE VITTHALASVƒÄMI TEMPLE AT HAMPI, HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated ≈öaka, 1459, Vi·∏∑ambi, Adhika-Jyƒìsh·π≠ha, ≈õu. 15, S≈çmavƒÅra corresponding to A.D. 1538 May 13, Monday. It records that, in the reign of Achyutadƒìva-MahƒÅrƒÅya, Hiriya Timmappa-NƒÅyaka, son of Udhiya Timappa-NƒÅyaka, gave a sum of gold coins for putting up pinnacles on the eastern g≈çpura of the Vi·π≠·π≠haladƒìva temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

ke hƒì·∏∑alƒÅgi Udhiya ti·πÅmappanƒÅyakara maganu rƒÅyara caparada hiriya
